steps.title: Set the input to zero
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute $x=0$ into the equation:

$$\frac{5(0)}{8}=-\frac{5y}{9}+22$$
$$0=-\frac{5y}{9}+22$$

steps.title: Solve for the coordinate
steps.content:
Move the variable term to the other side and multiply by $\frac{9}{5}$:

$$\frac{5y}{9}=22$$
$$y=22\cdot\frac{9}{5}=\frac{198}{5}$$

The answer is 198/5.
